title: Chinas Waning Crude Oil Demand A New Era For Global Energy Market
section_path: Chinas Waning Crude Oil Demand A New Era For Global Energy Market
section_path_text: Chinas Waning Crude Oil Demand A New Era For Global Energy Market
summary:
Main
The oil industry's euphoria over record profits in recent years is fading, as key players gather in Singapore for the Asia Pacific Petroleum Conference (APPEC). A combination of China's economic downturn, changes in the global energy landscape, and rising crude supply is pressuring the sector. Refining margins have dropped, and analysts are adjusting price and demand forecasts downward.
